patterns.name: border_restriction_phrase
patterns.pattern: \b(?:border restrictions?|temporary border closure|port of entry closure)\b
patterns.label: politics_concept

patterns.name: export_control_phrase
patterns.pattern: \b(?:export control|export controls|export ban|technology restrictions?|Entity List|end-user restrictions?)\b
patterns.label: politics_concept

patterns.name: government_stability_phrase
patterns.pattern: \b(?:coalition agreement|coalition government|confidence and supply|confidence vote|no-confidence vote)\b
patterns.label: politics_concept

patterns.name: resource_policy_phrase
patterns.pattern: \b(?:energy policy|energy regulation|government energy policy|gas policy|oil policy)\b
patterns.label: politics_concept

patterns.name: trade_diplomacy_phrase
patterns.pattern: \b(?:trade negotiations?|trade talks|trade deal talks|trade agreement negotiations?)\b
patterns.label: politics_concept
